hooks.command: git diff HEAD --quiet 2>/dev/null; rc=$?; if [ "$rc" -eq 1 ]; then git diff HEAD -- ':!*.env*' ':!*.key' ':!*.pem' ':!*credentials*' ':!*secret*' ':!*.lock' | head -c 51200 | node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/run.js" 'Briefly review these session changes for any critical issues. Be concise — 3 bullets max.'; fi

input=$(cat); echo "$input" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; staged=$(git diff --cached -- ':!*.env*' ':!*.key' ':!*.pem' ':!*credentials*' ':!*secret*' ':!*.lock' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0; echo "$staged" | head -c 51200 | node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/run.js" 'Review these staged changes about to be committed. Flag only critical issues that should block the commit. Be concise — 3 bullets max.' >&2; exit 0
